name: Case Study 1
history: Forms close relationships with friends who experience significant stressors. A friend is dealing with academic pressures and parenting an autistic child.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: I must help others to be valued.
intermediate_belief_depression: If I can't help, I am not worthy.
coping_strategies: Attempts to support friends in distress to feel needed.
situation: Considering visiting a friend managing parenting demands and housing instability.
auto_thought: If I don't visit, I am not a good friend.
behavior: Plans to visit the friend despite personal inconvenience.
